summary: Plan-only classification for live PR inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are allowed. #90033 is the clearest non-security session-affinity PR but lacks complete merge preflight, so it is retained rather than merged. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined individually. The remaining open draft/dirty PRs are useful independent repair candidates, but no complete executable fix_artifact is safe for this multi-repair shard, so they are retained as independent non-mutating classifications.
